---
title: "Shiva Sagar"
subtitle: "MSc Business Analytics · Dublin City University"
image: images/profile-photo.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/shiva-sagar-"
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/shivasagarsulige2-rgb"
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:shiva.sagar7130@gmail.com"
    - text: "{{< fa file-pdf >}} CV"
      href: CV/cv.pdf
      target: _blank
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## Welcome

:::: {.hero-quote}
"Data is not just numbers — it is the language through which the world tells its story."
::::

Hi, I'm **Shiva Sagar** — a Business Analytics graduate student at **Dublin City University**, passionate about transforming complex data into clear, strategic insights. With hands-on experience as a co-founder, accounting intern, and HR professional, I bring both technical rigour and real-world business perspective to every analysis.

This portfolio showcases my technical projects, academic journey, and the skills I've built across analytics, machine learning, and business strategy.

---

## Portfolio Sections

::::: {.columns}

::::: {.column width="33%"}
:::: {.experience-card .theme-ocean}
{{< fa graduation-cap >}} **Academic Journey**
MSc Business Analytics at DCU (2025–). BA Business Administration at ICFAI Business School (2024). Specialising in ML, NLP, SQL, Power BI, and statistical modelling.
::::
:::::

::::: {.column width="33%"}
:::: {.experience-card .theme-sunset}
{{< fa briefcase >}} **Business & Entrepreneurship**
Co-Founder of Wrench Mate PVT LTD — grew user base to 100+ active accounts and secured first 50,000 rupees in recurring monthly revenue. Also held accounting and HR internship roles.
::::
:::::

::::: {.column width="33%"}
:::: {.experience-card .theme-aurora}
{{< fa chart-line >}} **Analytics Projects**
Built interactive data dashboards, benchmarked NLP models (BERT vs T5), and produced ML classification pipelines — all with live, executable Python code and Plotly visualisations.
::::
:::::

:::::

---

## Quick Navigation

| Section | What You'll Find |
|---|---|
| [About](about.qmd) | Background, technical skills, certifications, and professional goals |
| [Other Experiences](other-experiences.qmd) | Entrepreneurship, internships, and DCU learning experiences |
| [Projects](projects/index.qmd) | Analytics and ML projects with live Python code and Plotly visualisations |
| [CV](CV/cv.pdf){target="_blank"} | Full curriculum vitae (PDF) |
| [Reflection](reflection.qmd) | Lessons learned building this portfolio — Git, Quarto, Python |
| [Contact](contact.qmd) | Contact details and professional references |

---

::: {.callout-tip title="Open to Opportunities"}
Available for graduate roles and internships from **October 2026**. Currently on Stamp 2 visa; eligible for Stamp 1G from September 2026. Feel free to [get in touch](contact.qmd)!
:::
